name: SCC_CreateCertificateUpdateReq_DIN
title: SCC_CreateCertificateUpdateReq_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateCertificateInstallationRes_DIN ( byte SessionID[], dword ConfigSection, char ResponseCode[], char EncryptedPrivateKey[], char DHParams[], char ContractID[], char MessageID[] )
description: Creates a Certificate Installation Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
